title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: EUGENE OUTREACH OFFICE TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 149 West 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 744-1334 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 744-1334 Toll-free (800) 877-2718 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE OUTREACH OFFICE
